{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220620159146DC22286CC97011"}"},"total":865},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574027698563154712","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看这种题材的文，出乎意外的好看，群像文，人物塑造的很立体，甚至不是主角团的人物也塑造的很丰满，短短几句就能勾起共鸣，两天追平[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]希望大大突更几十章。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763467757,"group_id":"7511224936283786265","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在摆烂与上进之间每天摇摆","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1j2pvZthLtl/ogeSpRuPNg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"110181238635","user_name":"原来是西瓜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110181238635","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7511224936283786265","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越赛博+无CP+无系统+经营发展+微群像】

万宁穿越到了赛博世界，成了个炮灰帮派的老大。
救命，这人设要怎么撑？
为了活命，只能硬着头皮装下去。
一枪清理掉叛徒后，万宁表面从容淡定，一切尽在掌握。
实则双腿发软，内心崩溃，她要装不下去了。
手下：万姐真牛！
万宁：全靠硬撑。

稳住阵脚后，团结帮派成员，大搞发展经营。
什么？不会经营帮派？
没关系，周报、复盘、奖金......通通搞起来。
在霓虹与钢铁交织的赛博地下世界，弱肉强食是唯一法则。
但万宁偏要在这片混沌中，立下自己的规矩！

手下：老大，我们不收保护费了？

rded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24860,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7300},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570340891237352216","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看。发现了之后一天把它追完了，满足了我对于那种既有有一点善心但是又足够狠厉的那种人的幻想。身边的人也写的很好。完全没有那种男女之分，全都是在打架干仗。我认为应该是没有瑕疵的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762609352,"group_id":"7511224936283786265","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UmqngZZdblqdxA5m8zx7HRMEQRyYUdhGyHsGUnPkpG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/966c19dce5a545258b1ed5c33af96457~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622757&x-signature=Hz%2Ftt%2BYF8l4bAeOdLLrSlGgE2BU%3D","user_id":"3426541599731936","user_name":"好吧好吧好吧，好吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3426541599731936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7511224936283786265","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越赛博+无CP+无系统+经营发展+微群像】

rded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11063,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11286},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7600212393773892414","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一追：苦等半个月，半小时就看完了，完全不够口牙QAQ
二追：又看了一久，从只有40多章的时候追的，现在追到285了，前中期真的很好看也很流畅，但是不知道从哪章开始，ai味及其严重，有一些描述和心理灌水灌的特别僵硬，写得毫无起伏，一点也不像前面那么吸引人，简直和会议记录一模一样干巴巴的。
还有“巧妙地”这个词，出现的也太频繁了，不是我敏感，我问ai作业的时候它就经常用这个词，所以我每次都要换个说法或者直接删掉，不管这篇后面有多少ai生成的吧，好歹作者也自己改改吧。
看前面的时候我是真的觉得这篇可以封神的，至少有个9.5，但是现在。。。。。。唉 五星改四星了，全靠前期撑着，看神作陨落好难受
但无论如何，前期都值得一看，非常非常精彩！后面就当口水文吧😣😣😣😣😣😣"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769567227,"group_id":"7511224936283786265","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1931213412237886"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7511224936283786265","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"144"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33008,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7541614578326029118","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"万姐好帅好有魅力，其他伙伴都有鲜明个性，不会存在分不清谁是谁的情况，番茄终于又给我淘到金了[哭]
超级超级超级好看！！！！！无论是人物塑造还是剧情安排还是叙事节奏都非常非常完美！！！
老天爷！！！一早上全看完了，还好现在不是很多，不然今晚就要熬夜看了
以这个节奏下去肯定能到9分以上，老大快写口牙！！我要永远追随你！！！😍😍😍😍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755922773,"group_id":"7511224936283786265","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3kFkhHEaOVb6o2w4Bae5BSX5zBZrkZoJIKEeYKw6I+9","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1931213412237886","user_name":"廊口的阿斯特瑞雅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1931213412237886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7511224936283786265","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越赛博+无CP+无系统+经营发展+微群像】
